assumptions.baseline: severity-zero identity/baseline/pristine/reference/self rows; otherwise the median of severity-zero rows
assumptions.bbox_coordinates: expected_bbox and predicted_bbox use one common coordinate system
assumptions.compound_components: components column or compound:family_a+family_b family name
assumptions.compound_rule: compound score <= every named component score on the expected axis
assumptions.invariant_control: severity-zero lossless rewrites are compared with the defined score optimum 1.0 at tolerance 0.01; they are not used as their own baseline
assumptions.localization_rule: page equality and bbox IoU > 0; predicted boxes are registered raster-residual enclosures, not semantic or axis-specific defect explanations
assumptions.missing_values: counted as abstentions when the expected axis is applicable
assumptions.multi_axis_targets: expected_axis may join axes with '+'; target response and severity ordering are evaluated on every named axis, never silently dropped
assumptions.ordering: severity ordering includes the severity-zero baseline; adjacent ties and score increases are failures beyond numerical tolerance 1e-12
assumptions.projection_repeat: duplicate sample_id/category/family/severity/seed rows test equality of stored projection values and the raster bbox; artifact hashes are validated separately
assumptions.score_direction: higher axis values mean better fidelity
assumptions.selectivity_boundary: target/off-target drops are descriptive only because v1 lacks preregistered per-variant affected-axis and invariant-axis contracts
assumptions.severity_direction: larger severity means a stronger defect; zero means invariant/pristine

claim_boundary.not_validated_here: CLEval, LTSim, PaIRS, reading-order semantics, GriTS, TEDS, CDM, SSIM, figure matching, human quality, aesthetic acceptability, or a universal scalar
claim_boundary.validated_here: controlled-response behavior of five ad-hoc harness projections: extracted-token F1, exact-token box-IoU q10, a mixed typography diagnostic, unregistered ink F1, and a page-count/break diagnostic

gate_assessment.rule: No family, variant, or category flag is averaged away. These are engineering response gates for harness projections, not proof of real-AI or human quality.
